title: I built an AI tool to analyze market structure — here’s what I learned
author: Extreme-Beautiful257
selftext:
For a long time, I struggled with the same problem most traders face:  
too many indicators, too much noise, and emotional entries.

So I started focusing only on market structure:

* Break of structure
* Higher high
* Higher low
* Entry on retest

It worked, but manually analyzing charts every time was exhausting.

That’s why I decided to build a small AI tool called **Aurex AI**.

What it does is simple:

* Detects market structure
* Suggests entry zones, stop loss, and take profit
* Explains why a trade makes sense
* Works on multiple timeframes (I use 15M for structure and 5M for entries)

The biggest difference?  
It doesn’t “predict” the market — it just removes guesswork.

I’m still testing and improving it, but honestly, it changed how I trade.  
I make fewer trades, but they’re more logical.

[Aurexai.cloud](http://Aurexai.cloud)
